name: Stephanie's Pumpkin Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
1/2 cup (1/4 cup) unsalted butter, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
For the Filling:
1 1/2 cups Solid packed pumpkin
3 Large eggs
1 1/2 teaspoons Cinnamon
1/2 teaspoon Fresh grated nutmeg
1/2 teaspoon Ground ginger
1/2 teaspoon Salt
1/2 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
3 packs (8 oz each) cream cheese, cut into bits and softened
1/2 cup Granulated sugar
2 tablespoons Heavy cream
1 tablespoon Cornstarch
1 teaspoon Vanilla
1 tablespoon Bourbon or bourbon liqueur
For the Topping:
2 cups Sour cream
2 tablespoons Granulated sugar
1 tablespoon Bourbon or bourbon liqueur
Combine the pumpkin, eggs, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, salt, and brown sugar in a bowl. In another large bowl, beat together the cream cheese and granulated sugar until smooth. Add the heavy cream, cornstarch, vanilla, and pumpkin mixture to the cream cheese mixture and stir until well combined.
Pour the filling into the crust and bake at 350°F for 50-55 minutes or until set. Let cool in the pan on a rack for 5 minutes before spreading the sour cream, sugar, and bourbon mixture over the top of the cheesecake. Bake for an additional 5 minutes. Chill overnight, remove the sides of the pan, and garnish with pecans.
